body.text: I'm Leo Stone, and welcome to today's markets brief. I'm looking at the market trends and AI stocks that are making headlines. Market downturns can be nerve-wracking, but they're also great opportunities to snag good stocks at a discount. We saw this play out in the first quarter when many large tech stocks took a hit early on.

My quick read: today's market story has that familiar split-screen feeling. There is real excitement around artificial intelligence and chips, but the room still keeps one eye on risk, because markets enjoy a celebration more when they know where the exits are.
